_doc: STRUCTURE EXAMPLES ONLY. Every entry here is status:'draft' with consent.granted:false and therefore is NEVER published, never rendered, and never schema-marked. These exist solely to document the shape and to exercise the guardrail tests. Do NOT flip any of these to 'published' — real testimonials enter via the consent/moderation pipeline (Phase 4) with a stored consent.record.

testimonials.quote: She used to translate every sentence in her head before speaking. After a term she answers in connected sentences and actually enjoys it.

testimonials.authorDisplay: Phụ huynh của học sinh 14 tuổi (ví dụ)
testimonials.quote: Con tôi nói có cấu trúc hơn và tự tin đưa ra lý do, thay vì chỉ trả lời một câu ngắn.

testimonials.authorDisplay: 一位 11 岁学生的家长（示例）
testimonials.quote: 孩子现在敢开口表达，能把想法连成几句话说清楚，课后也愿意继续练习。
